strategy_engine.notes: Hyperliquid testnet demo profile. Sandboxed by default: execution_mode per strategy controls sandbox routing, so no live order is placed until Hyperliquid's gated sandbox write test (HERMX_RUN_HYPERLIQUID_WRITE_TESTS) has proven the venue. Hyperliquid auth is wallet+private key (HYPERLIQUID_WALLET_ADDRESS / HYPERLIQUID_PRIVATE_KEY), resolved fail-closed. Set HERMX_LIVE_TRADING=true to enable live execution.

notes: Hyperliquid testnet only. New venue stays DISARMED until its gated write test passes. ccxt hyperliquid dep/auth imported lazily; integration tests skip cleanly when absent.
